title: Auth Events Subscriber Bootstrap Response
description: Mercure subscriber bootstrap payload returned by GET /cms-api/v1/auth/events. Contains the public hub URL, the per-user private topic IRI, and the JWT lifetime in seconds. Native clients receive a short-lived HMAC-SHA256 JWT scoped to that topic and subscribe with an Authorization bearer header. Browser clients can request transport=cookie, in which case the backend sets an HttpOnly mercureAuthorization cookie and token is null.

hubUrl.description: Public URL of the Mercure hub the subscriber should connect to (MERCURE_PUBLIC_URL). The internal MERCURE_URL used by Symfony to publish is intentionally NOT exposed.

topic.description: Per-user ACL change topic IRI (e.g. https://selfhelp.app/users/{id}/acl). Receives `acl-changed` events when the user's ACL version is bumped. Topics are opaque identifiers — never dereferenced.

impersonationTopic.description: Per-user impersonation-lifecycle topic IRI (e.g. https://selfhelp.app/users/{id}/impersonation). Receives `impersonation-status` events when an admin starts or stops impersonating this user. Both topics share the same subscriber JWT in the `token` field.

token.description: Short-lived HMAC-SHA256 JWT to send as Authorization: Bearer <token> when subscribing to hubUrl. Authorises BOTH `topic` and `impersonationTopic` so the BFF only needs one upstream connection. Lifetime equals expiresIn seconds; the BFF should re-mint via this endpoint on every Mercure reconnect.

expiresIn.description: Lifetime of token in seconds (MERCURE_SUBSCRIBER_TTL). Treat as an upper bound.
